_comment: Extended voice profiles — 200 entries covering tech, finance, healthcare, legal, ops, design, seniority, style archetypes, and industry hybrids. All INSERT OR IGNORE safe.

cv_voice_profiles.name: startup_engineer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Bias towards action and speed. Short bullets, high human energy, low ceremony.

cv_voice_profiles.name: platform_architect
cv_voice_profiles.description: Speaks in layers, contracts, and SLAs. Owns decisions, not just deliverables.

cv_voice_profiles.name: ml_researcher
cv_voice_profiles.description: Models, datasets, benchmarks. Precise about what was trained and what improved.

cv_voice_profiles.name: devops_reliability
cv_voice_profiles.description: Uptime, pipelines, on-call rotations. Bullets end in a number or a prevented outage.

cv_voice_profiles.name: security_guardian
cv_voice_profiles.description: CVEs, controls, compliance. Every bullet names the risk or the remediation.

cv_voice_profiles.name: frontend_craftsperson
cv_voice_profiles.description: Renders, interactions, accessibility, and load times. Shows care for the end user.

cv_voice_profiles.name: backend_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Endpoints, databases, concurrency. Cares about correctness and latency.

cv_voice_profiles.name: data_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Sources, transforms, sinks. ETL, orchestration, and data quality at scale.

cv_voice_profiles.name: cloud_native_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: K8s, Terraform, cloud cost. Thinks in clusters and deployment pipelines.

cv_voice_profiles.name: api_first_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: APIs, SDKs, versioning. Writes for developers consuming the work.

cv_voice_profiles.name: open_source_contributor
cv_voice_profiles.description: PRs, issues, releases, community metrics. Explicit about upstream contributions.

cv_voice_profiles.name: mobile_developer
cv_voice_profiles.description: App store ratings, crash rates, MAU. Cross-platform or native, specific about the stack.

cv_voice_profiles.name: qa_champion
cv_voice_profiles.description: Test coverage, defect escape rate, regression savings. Prevention over cure.

cv_voice_profiles.name: technical_writer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Docs, tutorials, API references. Measures in readability and developer adoption.

cv_voice_profiles.name: algorithm_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Big-O, runtime gains, benchmark comparisons. Shows the before and after.

cv_voice_profiles.name: database_authority
cv_voice_profiles.description: Query plans, index strategies, migration paths. Never vague about the data model.

cv_voice_profiles.name: infrastructure_owner
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cost per unit, SLA compliance, failover design. Owns the bill and the uptime.

cv_voice_profiles.name: full_stack_executor
cv_voice_profiles.description: Owns both front and back. Bullets show the full journey from input to output.

cv_voice_profiles.name: tech_lead_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Sets direction, removes blockers, measures in team throughput. Balances code and people.

cv_voice_profiles.name: embedded_systems_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Firmware, RTOS, memory budgets. Every byte and cycle matters.

cv_voice_profiles.name: investment_analyst
cv_voice_profiles.description: Returns, multiples, models. Every sentence traces back to a financial outcome.

cv_voice_profiles.name: risk_manager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Regulatory frameworks, risk appetite, control effectiveness. Sober and precise.

cv_voice_profiles.name: portfolio_manager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: AUM, alpha, attribution. Shows which calls moved the needle.

cv_voice_profiles.name: financial_controller
cv_voice_profiles.description: Month-end, reconciliations, GAAP/IFRS compliance. Accurate and accountable.

cv_voice_profiles.name: audit_professional
cv_voice_profiles.description: Scope, findings, recommendations. Neutral tone, explicit about what was examined.

cv_voice_profiles.name: strategy_consultant
cv_voice_profiles.description: Problem structuring, hypothesis-led, McKinsey-adjacent without the jargon.

cv_voice_profiles.name: corporate_banker
cv_voice_profiles.description: Mandates, fee income, client coverage. Discrete, outcome-oriented.

cv_voice_profiles.name: treasury_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cash positions, hedging ratios, bank relationships. Numbers anchor every bullet.

cv_voice_profiles.name: cfo_narrative
cv_voice_profiles.description: Capital allocation, investor relations, financial strategy. Owns the full P&L story.

cv_voice_profiles.name: accountant_precise
cv_voice_profiles.description: VAT, year-end, management accounts. Specific about standards and close cycles.

cv_voice_profiles.name: enterprise_seller
cv_voice_profiles.description: ACV, ACR, cycle length. Shows where deals were won, lost, and learned from.

cv_voice_profiles.name: sdr_hunter
cv_voice_profiles.description: Sequences, meetings booked, connect rates. Gritty and high-cadence.

cv_voice_profiles.name: partnership_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: Alliance revenue, integration partners, co-sell programmes. Long-game thinker.

cv_voice_profiles.name: growth_hacker_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: A/B tests, cohorts, funnel stages. Speaks the language of growth loops.

cv_voice_profiles.name: content_strategist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Editorial calendars, SEO performance, content pipeline. Thinks in channels and personas.

cv_voice_profiles.name: brand_voice_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Brand architecture, tonality, consistency across channels. Qualitative and strategic.

cv_voice_profiles.name: performance_marketer
cv_voice_profiles.description: CPL, ROAS, CPA, LTCV. Every campaign lives or dies by the numbers.

cv_voice_profiles.name: product_marketer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Launches, competitive intel, enablement. Bridges product and market.

cv_voice_profiles.name: community_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: DAU, NPS, events, forums. Grows and retains user communities.

cv_voice_profiles.name: pr_professional
cv_voice_profiles.description: Placements, tier-1 media, crisis comms. Shows reach and tone management.

cv_voice_profiles.name: clinical_researcher
cv_voice_profiles.description: Trials, cohorts, p-values, endpoints. Rigorous and explicitly scientific.

cv_voice_profiles.name: nursing_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Patient load, outcome measures, multidisciplinary care. Empathetic but metric-grounded.

cv_voice_profiles.name: physician_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Patient volumes, procedures, outcomes, and committee work. Formal without being cold.

cv_voice_profiles.name: pharmacist_technical
cv_voice_profiles.description: Dispensing volumes, clinical interventions, regulatory adherence.

cv_voice_profiles.name: biotech_scientist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Assays, hits, candidates, IND filings. Precise about the science and the timeline.

cv_voice_profiles.name: public_health_officer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Disease rates, interventions, policy outcomes. Broad scope, systemic thinking.

cv_voice_profiles.name: healthcare_administrator
cv_voice_profiles.description: Bed days, wait times, cost per patient, staff ratios. Operational and accountable.

cv_voice_profiles.name: mental_health_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Caseload, therapeutic modalities, waiting list impact. Compassionate but outcome-driven.

cv_voice_profiles.name: corporate_lawyer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Agreements, closing mechanics, transaction value. Formal but not impenetrable.

cv_voice_profiles.name: litigation_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cases, rulings, settlements, appeal rates. Argues with evidence, not volume.

cv_voice_profiles.name: compliance_officer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Breaches, controls, frameworks, remediation timelines. Sober and thorough.

cv_voice_profiles.name: policy_analyst
cv_voice_profiles.description: Policy options, impact assessments, stakeholder consultations. Brief-writing precision.

cv_voice_profiles.name: regulatory_expert
cv_voice_profiles.description: Submissions, approvals, dossier quality. Knows the regulator's language.

cv_voice_profiles.name: data_protection_officer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Data flows, breach response, DPIA. Cross-functional by necessity.

cv_voice_profiles.name: academic_researcher
cv_voice_profiles.description: Papers, grants, citations, impact factor. Research excellence expressed concisely.

cv_voice_profiles.name: university_lecturer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Module delivery, student outcomes, curriculum innovation. Teaching excellence visible.

cv_voice_profiles.name: primary_educator
cv_voice_profiles.description: Class size, outcomes, differentiation, parental engagement. Caring but evidenced.

cv_voice_profiles.name: curriculum_designer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Learning objectives, instructional design, assessment frameworks. Clear about the design decisions.

cv_voice_profiles.name: social_scientist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Qualitative and quantitative research, ethnography, policy implications.

cv_voice_profiles.name: economist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Regressions, demand curves, policy simulations. Every claim has a coefficient behind it.

cv_voice_profiles.name: supply_chain_optimizer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Inventory turns, supplier performance, OTIF. Constant hunt for waste.

cv_voice_profiles.name: procurement_specialist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Category spend, supplier rationalisation, negotiated savings. Shows the baseline and the outcome.

cv_voice_profiles.name: project_manager_pmo
cv_voice_profiles.description: Milestones, RAID logs, change control. Shows delivery discipline without buzzwords.

cv_voice_profiles.name: manufacturing_lead
cv_voice_profiles.description: Yield, throughput, shift performance. Lean language without buzzwords.

cv_voice_profiles.name: logistics_coordinator
cv_voice_profiles.description: Route plans, fleet utilisation, customs compliance. Precision over narrative.

cv_voice_profiles.name: lean_practitioner
cv_voice_profiles.description: PDCA, 5S, VSM. Counts the steps and cuts the waste. Humble, improvement-first.

cv_voice_profiles.name: talent_acquisition_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Time-to-fill, source mix, offer acceptance, quality-of-hire. Shows the funnel.

cv_voice_profiles.name: people_partner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: ENPS, attrition, performance calibration. Human-centric but tied to business outcomes.

cv_voice_profiles.name: compensation_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Pay ranges, job levelling, salary review cycles. Calm and factual.

cv_voice_profiles.name: ld_designer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Completion rates, pre/post scores, manager feedback. Shows the lift.

cv_voice_profiles.name: dei_practitioner
cv_voice_profiles.description: Representation data, pipeline shifts, inclusion measures. Evidence-led, not performative.

cv_voice_profiles.name: ux_researcher_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Studies, usability sessions, pain points, design recommendations. Translates evidence to action.

cv_voice_profiles.name: product_designer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Flows, iterations, design system contributions. Shows design thinking and execution.

cv_voice_profiles.name: brand_designer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Brand systems, visual language, cross-channel consistency. Shows the strategic rationale.

cv_voice_profiles.name: copywriter_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: CTR, conversion lifts, A/B winners. Proves the words moved the numbers.

cv_voice_profiles.name: design_systems_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Token adoption, component library coverage, design-dev handoff speed.

cv_voice_profiles.name: entry_enthusiast
cv_voice_profiles.description: Early in career; bullets show what was learned and contributed, not just tasks done.

cv_voice_profiles.name: graduate_fresh
cv_voice_profiles.description: Strong academics, internships, relevant projects. Bridges dissertation to deliverable.

cv_voice_profiles.name: junior_grower
cv_voice_profiles.description: Shows ownership increasing over time. First few solo deliverables clearly flagged.

cv_voice_profiles.name: mid_level_confident
cv_voice_profiles.description: Owns the end-to-end. Moving from task executor to problem solver. Confident without bluster.

cv_voice_profiles.name: senior_expert
cv_voice_profiles.description: Deep domain knowledge, cross-team influence, mentoring junior colleagues. Not just titles.

cv_voice_profiles.name: lead_strategic
cv_voice_profiles.description: Sets direction, removes blockers, spans of control. Measures in team throughput.

cv_voice_profiles.name: principal_innovator
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cross-team initiatives, technical standards, fellowship/thought leadership.

cv_voice_profiles.name: director_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Revenue and cost accountability. Bridges C-suite strategy to operational reality.

cv_voice_profiles.name: founder_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Built something from scratch. Wears every hat. Bullets show the full scope of ownership.

cv_voice_profiles.name: career_changer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Draws the line between old domain and new target. Every bullet bridges the gap.

cv_voice_profiles.name: freelance_contractor
cv_voice_profiles.description: Engagement scope, client outcomes, turnaround time. Shows breadth across mandates.

cv_voice_profiles.name: portfolio_career_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Multiple parallel roles or functions. Shows how the breadth adds up to a coherent profile.

cv_voice_profiles.name: interim_leader
cv_voice_profiles.description: Short tenure, rapid impact. Bullets show what was stabilised, fixed, or handed over.

cv_voice_profiles.name: volunteer_achiever
cv_voice_profiles.description: NGO, charity, community work. Shows what was achieved on minimal resources.

cv_voice_profiles.name: minimalist_bullets
cv_voice_profiles.description: 8 words or fewer per bullet. Zero filler. Verb + object + number, full stop.

cv_voice_profiles.name: em_dash_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Every bullet ends with an em-dash result clause. Bang. Clean. Final.

cv_voice_profiles.name: metric_saturated
cv_voice_profiles.description: Every single bullet has at least one quantified result. Always.

cv_voice_profiles.name: qualitative_artisan
cv_voice_profiles.description: Rich description, no numbers. Shows the shape of the work and its human significance.

cv_voice_profiles.name: opener_heavy
cv_voice_profiles.description: Almost every bullet begins with a context-setting opener clause. Sets the scene before the action.

cv_voice_profiles.name: parallel_perfectionist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Every bullet follows the exact same grammatical pattern. High formality. Zero deviation.

cv_voice_profiles.name: british_formal
cv_voice_profiles.description: British spellings, full sentences, formal register. Suited for UK public sector or law firms.

cv_voice_profiles.name: american_crisp
cv_voice_profiles.description: American English, forward-leaning, startup-compatible. Results pop. No passive.

cv_voice_profiles.name: academic_formal
cv_voice_profiles.description: Written for academic or research CVs. Longer sentences, passive where appropriate.

cv_voice_profiles.name: military_precision
cv_voice_profiles.description: Command, mission, personnel, outcomes. Military conventions without jargon lock-in.

cv_voice_profiles.name: investor_pitch_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: TAM, MRR, burn, runway. Reads like a Series A deck, not a resume.

cv_voice_profiles.name: board_deck_ready
cv_voice_profiles.description: Concise, strategic, accountability-focused. One insight per bullet. No noise.

cv_voice_profiles.name: fintech_engineer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Code and compliance. Payments, KYC, card rails. Shows the regulatory and technical depth.

cv_voice_profiles.name: healthtech_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: EHR integrations, FHIR, clinical validation. Navigates both the technical and regulatory worlds.

cv_voice_profiles.name: edtech_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: Learning outcomes and engagement metrics. Where curriculum design meets product analytics.

cv_voice_profiles.name: legaltech_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Contract AI, e-discovery, regulatory tech. Bridges legal expertise and software thinking.

cv_voice_profiles.name: climatetech_operator
cv_voice_profiles.description: Carbon, Scope 1-3, abatement costs, renewable energy. Both the planet and the P&L.

cv_voice_profiles.name: govtech_builder
cv_voice_profiles.description: Digital government services, accessibility, public procurement. Delivers for citizens.

cv_voice_profiles.name: agritech_scientist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Yield predictions, sensor networks, precision farming. Hard data from the ground up.

cv_voice_profiles.name: cybersecurity_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: TTPs, MITRE, incident response, blue/red team. Shows the threat and the response.

cv_voice_profiles.name: aerospace_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Tolerances, certification, DO-178, reliability figures. Nothing approximate.

cv_voice_profiles.name: energy_specialist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: MWh, capacity factor, grid compliance, LCOE. Shows commercial and technical depth.

cv_voice_profiles.name: humble_achiever
cv_voice_profiles.description: Earns credibility by letting outcomes do the talking. No superlatives, no fluff.

cv_voice_profiles.name: diplomatic_asserter
cv_voice_profiles.description: Navigates competing priorities without drama. Shows influence without authority.

cv_voice_profiles.name: systems_thinker_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Traces problems upstream, fixes systems not symptoms. Long bullets that show the chain.

cv_voice_profiles.name: customer_obsessed_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Customer outcomes lead every bullet. CSAT, churn, support escalations all visible.

cv_voice_profiles.name: bias_for_action_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Ships early, iterates, learns. Verbs lead. Fast cycles explicitly noted.

cv_voice_profiles.name: social_impact_measurer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Beneficiary counts, SROI, programme reach. Shows impact without sentimentality.

cv_voice_profiles.name: international_development
cv_voice_profiles.description: Donor-funded, multi-country programmes. Local context respected, global accountability met.

cv_voice_profiles.name: data_skeptic_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Shows limitations alongside results. Doesn't overclaim. Credibility through honesty.

cv_voice_profiles.name: operations_analyst_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cycle time, error rates, SLA adherence. Operational rigour without losing the human lens.

cv_voice_profiles.name: demand_planner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: MAPE, bias, collaboration across S&OP. Shows the upstream and downstream impact.

cv_voice_profiles.name: continuous_improvement_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Kaizen events, A3s, waste categories named. Shows the method and the outcome.

cv_voice_profiles.name: hr_analytics_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Attrition models, headcount planning, skills gap analysis. Brings data to people decisions.

cv_voice_profiles.name: executive_coach_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Leadership development, 360 feedback loops, capability uplift. Qualitative and outcome-anchored.

cv_voice_profiles.name: sales_leader_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Leads a team to quota. Pipeline health, ramp time, win rate. Owns the number.

cv_voice_profiles.name: pre_sales_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: RFI/RFP responses, PoC win rates, technical objection handling. Bridges product and prospect.

cv_voice_profiles.name: customer_success_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: NRR, churn, health scores, QBRs. Keeps revenue and grows it.

cv_voice_profiles.name: accountmanager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Retention, upsell, executive relationships. Quiet confidence in a long-term game.

cv_voice_profiles.name: market_researcher_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Surveys, panels, concept testing, NPS drivers. Turns data into decision-ready insight.

cv_voice_profiles.name: cmo_narrative_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Brand equity, pipeline contribution, media efficiency. Marketing as a revenue driver.

cv_voice_profiles.name: social_enterprise_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Impact and revenue together. Shows that the mission and the model reinforce each other.

cv_voice_profiles.name: civil_servant_senior
cv_voice_profiles.description: Parliamentary briefings, ministerial submissions, cross-departmental coordination.

cv_voice_profiles.name: ngo_country_director
cv_voice_profiles.description: Country-level programme accountability, USAID/DFID reporting, local staff leadership.

cv_voice_profiles.name: philanthropic_advisor
cv_voice_profiles.description: Grant-making, due diligence, portfolio impact. Speaks to both heart and rigour.

cv_voice_profiles.name: accelerator_mentor
cv_voice_profiles.description: Advises startups with the benefit of having built. Bullets blend advice given with outcomes seen.

cv_voice_profiles.name: ip_specialist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Patent filings, licensing revenues, freedom-to-operate opinions. Bridges law and innovation.

cv_voice_profiles.name: m_and_a_specialist
cv_voice_profiles.description: Deal size, synergy capture, 100-day plans. Knows the numbers before and after.

cv_voice_profiles.name: real_estate_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: AUM, yield, occupancy, LTV. Every asset has a number attached.

cv_voice_profiles.name: insurance_specialist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Loss ratios, combined ratio, reserve development. Speaks the actuarial language precisely.

cv_voice_profiles.name: supply_chain_director
cv_voice_profiles.description: Network design, supplier risk, working capital. Strategic not just operational.

cv_voice_profiles.name: warehouse_manager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Pick accuracy, despatch on-time, cost per order. Floor-level reality, measurable.

cv_voice_profiles.name: nurse_educator_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Simulation, sign-off rates, preceptorship. Evidence of learning delivered.

cv_voice_profiles.name: paramedic_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Call volumes, clinical decisions, protocol adherence. Every second counted, literally.

cv_voice_profiles.name: sport_scientist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Watt, VO2 max, load monitoring, injury rates. Sport science precision.

cv_voice_profiles.name: environmental_scientist
cv_voice_profiles.description: EIA, species counts, pollution load, regulatory compliance. Fieldwork made legible.

cv_voice_profiles.name: architect_building_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: RIBA stages, planning consent, contractor coordination, cost plans.

cv_voice_profiles.name: civil_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Tolerances, specifications, material quantities, NCRs. Named standards, real numbers.

cv_voice_profiles.name: quantity_surveyor_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Bills of quantities, final accounts, procurement strategy, cost savings.

cv_voice_profiles.name: water_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: WASH projects, borehole yields, distribution networks, beneficiary counts.

cv_voice_profiles.name: agronomist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Soil health, varieties, irrigation schedules, crop protection. Specific about the science.

cv_voice_profiles.name: irrigation_specialist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Ha irrigated, water use efficiency, scheme design, community governance.

cv_voice_profiles.name: extension_officer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Demonstrations, adoption rates, group formation. Behaviour change at community scale.

cv_voice_profiles.name: programme_manager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Programme governance, interdependency management, benefits tracking. Strategic delivery.

cv_voice_profiles.name: change_manager_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Impacted population, adoption rates, resistance management, transition readiness.

cv_voice_profiles.name: startup_ceo_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Runway, growth rate, team size, fundraising. Owns strategy and the floor.

cv_voice_profiles.name: cto_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Tech strategy, team scaling, system reliability at company level. Board-intelligible.

cv_voice_profiles.name: vp_product_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: OKRs, discovery to delivery, cross-functional influence. Accountability without authority.

cv_voice_profiles.name: product_owner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: User stories, sprint velocity, acceptance criteria, dependency management.

cv_voice_profiles.name: scrum_master_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Sprint throughput, cycle time, retrospective improvements. Servant leader not just facilitator.

cv_voice_profiles.name: digital_transformation_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Business process redesign, platform migrations, capability uplift, adoption metrics.

cv_voice_profiles.name: pricing_strategist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Price elasticity, packaging tiers, competitive benchmarks. Drives revenue per unit.

cv_voice_profiles.name: operations_research_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Linear programming, simulation, queue theory applied. Shows the decision, not just the output.

cv_voice_profiles.name: renewable_energy_developer
cv_voice_profiles.description: Development pipeline, permitting, financing close, COD. Every project stage named.

cv_voice_profiles.name: esg_practitioner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: GRI, TCFD, CSRD. Shows what was measured, what changed, and what was disclosed.

cv_voice_profiles.name: transport_planner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Transport modelling, scheme appraisal, active travel uptake, benefit-cost ratios.

cv_voice_profiles.name: urban_planner_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Planning permissions, masterplans, community engagement, viability. Spatial and social.

cv_voice_profiles.name: structural_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Eurocodes, load calculations, connection design. Every structure has a number and a standard.

cv_voice_profiles.name: geotechnical_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Site investigation, bearing capacities, slope stability. Ground truthing behind every recommendation.

cv_voice_profiles.name: mechanical_engineer_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Design-for-manufacture, thermal analysis, mechanical testing. Physical world precision.

cv_voice_profiles.name: process_chemist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Batch yields, purity specs, scale-up from lab to pilot to plant. GMP-aware.

cv_voice_profiles.name: health_economist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cost-effectiveness, HTA submissions, budget impact models. Bridges clinical and financial.

cv_voice_profiles.name: epidemiologist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Cohort studies, outbreak investigation, age-standardised rates. Public health's detective.

cv_voice_profiles.name: lab_scientist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Assay development, QC metrics, protocol troubleshooting. Shows the bench work clearly.

cv_voice_profiles.name: dentist_clinical_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Procedures, patient satisfaction, referral rates, practice growth.

cv_voice_profiles.name: physiotherapist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Patient function scores, discharge rates, MSK outcomes, caseload management.

cv_voice_profiles.name: genetic_researcher_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: WGS, GWAS, variant classification, polygenic scores. Molecular precision.

cv_voice_profiles.name: librarian_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Collection development, catalogue accuracy, usage statistics, information literacy.

cv_voice_profiles.name: think_tank_analyst_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Policy papers, parliamentary briefings, media engagement. Research with a policy edge.

cv_voice_profiles.name: diplomat_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Bilateral relations, multilateral negotiations, treaty language. Formal and precise.

cv_voice_profiles.name: journalist_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Stories broken, investigations published, audiences reached. Journalism economy of language.

cv_voice_profiles.name: translator_voice
cv_voice_profiles.description: Language pairs, word counts, domains, CAT tool proficiency. Shows the scope of the work.

cv_voice_profiles.name: documentary_maker_voice
